zh.lifeSummary: 當Dyddgu ferch Madog於1120年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor79歲，母親Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales51歲。她與Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1200年在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年81歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dyddgu ferch Madog于1120年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，她的父亲Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor79岁，母亲Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales51岁。她与Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1200年在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年81岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dyddgu ferch Madog was born in 1120, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, was 79 and her mother, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, was 51. She married Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1200, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dyddgu ferch Madog est née en 1120, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, avait 79 ans et sa mère, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1200, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dyddgu ferch Madog 1120 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor 79 und ihre Mutter Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales 51. Sie hat in Wales Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1200 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dyddgu ferch Madog è nata il nel 1120 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, sua padre, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, aveva 79 anni e sua madre, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1200, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dyddgu ferch Madogが1120年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnorは79歳，母Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Walesは51歳であった。ウェールズでLord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1200年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで81歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dyddgu ferch Madog(이)가 1120년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor(은)는 79세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 웨일스에서 Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dyddgu ferch Madog nasceu em 1120, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, tinha 79 anos e sua mãe, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1200, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dyddgu ferch Madog родилась в 1120 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor было 79 лет, а матери, которую звали Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1200 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dyddgu ferch Madog nació en 1120, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Madog Ap Idnerth of Builth Radnor, tenía 79 años y su mamá, Rhanullt ferch Gruffydd of Wales, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1200, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
